org.key_project.util.collection

    • Method Detail

      • readResolve

        private Object readResolve()
                    throws ObjectStreamException
        the NIL list is a singleton. Deserialization builds a new NIL object that has to be replaced by the singleton.
        Throws:
        ObjectStreamException
